item.title: Shellзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description:
рҹҗҡ Shell и„ҡжң¬зҹҘиҜҶж•ҙзҗҶжүӢеҶҢ

дёҖгҖҒеҸҳйҮҸдёҺзҺҜеўғ

1. еҸҳйҮҸж“ҚдҪң

1set -- 'a' 'b'
  • жё…з©әжүҖжңүдҪҚзҪ®еҸӮж•°пјҢе№¶йҮҚж–°и®ҫзҪ® $1 $2 ...
1unset еҸҳйҮҸеҗҚ
  • еҲ йҷӨеҸҳйҮҸпјҲеұҖйғЁеҸҳйҮҸ + зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјү
1export еҸҳйҮҸеҗҚ=еҖј
2declare -x еҸҳйҮҸеҗҚ=еҖј
  • еҜјеҮәдёәзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҲеӯҗиҝӣзЁӢеҸҜз”Ёпјү
1env
  • жҹҘзңӢеҪ“еүҚзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸ
1declare
  • еЈ°жҳҺеҸҳйҮҸпјҲеҸҜз”ЁдәҺе®ҡд№үзұ»еһӢ/еұһжҖ§пјү

2. зү№ж®ҠеҸҳйҮҸ

еҸҳйҮҸ еҗ«д№ү
$0 и„ҡжң¬еҗҚз§°
$1 ~ $9 еҸӮж•°1~9
${10} з¬¬10дёӘеҸӮж•°
$# еҸӮж•°дёӘж•°
$* жүҖжңүеҸӮж•°пјҲж•ҙдҪ“пјү
$@ жүҖжңүеҸӮж•°пјҲйҖҗдёӘпјү
$? дёҠдёҖдёӘе‘Ҫд»Өжү§иЎҢзҠ¶жҖҒпјҲ0жҲҗеҠҹпјү
$$ еҪ“еүҚиҝӣзЁӢPID
$! дёҠдёҖдёӘеҗҺеҸ°иҝӣзЁӢPID
$_ дёҠдёҖдёӘе‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘеҸӮж•°

3. и·Ҝеҫ„еӨ„зҗҶ

1dirname и·Ҝеҫ„   # иҺ·еҸ–зӣ®еҪ•
2basename и·Ҝеҫ„  # иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ

дәҢгҖҒеҸӮж•°еұ•ејҖпјҲеҸҳйҮҸй«ҳзә§з”Ёжі•пјү

1. еҹәжң¬з”Ёжі•

1${arg}          # иҺ·еҸ–еҸҳйҮҸеҖј
2${#arg}         # й•ҝеәҰ
3${arg:offset}   # жҲӘеҸ–
4${arg:offset:len}

2. еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеӨ„зҗҶ

1${arg#word}     # д»ҺеүҚеҲ йҷӨжңҖзҹӯеҢ№й…Қ
2${arg##word}    # д»ҺеүҚеҲ йҷӨжңҖй•ҝеҢ№й…Қ
3${arg%word}     # д»ҺеҗҺеҲ йҷӨжңҖзҹӯеҢ№й…Қ
4${arg%%word}    # д»ҺеҗҺеҲ йҷӨжңҖй•ҝеҢ№й…Қ

3. жӣҝжҚў

1${arg/pattern/string}    # жӣҝжҚўдёҖж¬Ў
2${arg//pattern/string}   # е…ЁйғЁжӣҝжҚў

4. й»ҳи®ӨеҖјжңәеҲ¶пјҲйҮҚзӮ№вӯҗпјү

1${arg:-word}   # дёәз©әдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖј
2${arg:=word}   # дёәз©әиөӢеҖј
3${arg:?word}   # дёәз©әжҠҘй”ҷ
4${arg:+word}   # дёҚдёәз©әжүҚдҪҝз”Ё

дёүгҖҒз®—жңҜиҝҗз®—

1((a=1+2))
2let a=1+2
3expr 1 + 2
4$[1+2]
5echo "1+2" | bc
6awk 'BEGIN{print 1+2}'

жҺЁиҚҗпјҡ(( )) жңҖеёёз”Ё рҹ‘Қ

item.title: MySQLзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description:
MySQL еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢгҖӮж•ҙзҗҶдёҖеҘ— д»Һе…Ҙй—Ё вҶ’ иҝӣйҳ¶ вҶ’ й«ҳзә§ вҶ’ з”ҹдә§е®һжҲҳ зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙж•ҷзЁӢдҪ“зі»пјҢе№¶дё”еҜ№жҜ”иҜҙжҳҺ MySQL еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢе’ҢеҮҪж•°зҡ„еҢәеҲ«гҖӮ

дёҖгҖҒMySQL еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢ vs еҮҪж•°еҢәеҲ«

еҜ№жҜ”йЎ№ еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢпјҲProcedureпјү еҮҪж•°пјҲFunctionпјү
жҳҜеҗҰеҝ…йЎ»иҝ”еӣһеҖј дёҚеҝ…йЎ» еҝ…йЎ»иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘеҖј
дҪҝз”ЁдҪҚзҪ® йҖҡиҝҮ CALL и°ғз”Ё еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘеңЁ SELECT дёӯдҪҝз”Ё
иҝ”еӣһж–№ејҸ OUT еҸӮж•° / SELECT RETURN
жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜдҝ®ж”№ж•°жҚ® еҸҜд»Ҙ еҸҜд»ҘпјҲдҪҶдёҚе»әи®®пјү
жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜеңЁSQLиҜӯеҸҘдёӯдҪҝз”Ё дёҚеҸҜд»Ҙ еҸҜд»Ҙ
йҖӮеҗҲеңәжҷҜ дёҡеҠЎйҖ»иҫ‘гҖҒдәӢеҠЎеӨ„зҗҶ и®Ўз®—гҖҒеӯ—ж®өеҠ е·Ҙ

зӨәдҫӢеҜ№жҜ”

еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢ

1CALL get_user(1);

еҮҪж•°

1SELECT get_user_name(1);

дәҢгҖҒMySQL еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢеҹәзЎҖ

1пёҸвғЈ еҲӣе»әеӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢ

1DELIMITER $$
2
3CREATE PROCEDURE hello_world()
4BEGIN
5    SELECT 'Hello MySQL';
6END $$
7
8DELIMITER ;

е…ій”®зӮ№и§ЈйҮҠ

  • DELIMITER $$ еӣ дёәиҝҮзЁӢеҶ…йғЁжңү ;пјҢеҝ…йЎ»дёҙж—¶дҝ®ж”№з»“жқҹз¬Ұ
  • BEGIN ... END иҝҮзЁӢдҪ“
  • жү§иЎҢж–№ејҸпјҡ
1CALL hello_world();

2пёҸвғЈ еёҰеҸӮж•°зҡ„еӯҳеӮЁиҝҮзЁӢ

еҸӮж•°зұ»еһӢпјҡ

item.title: Elasticsearchзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-3
item.description:
ElasticsearchйқўиҜ•й«ҳйў‘й—®йўҳпјҲеҗ«ж ҮеҮҶзӯ”жЎҲпјҢйқўиҜ•еҝ…иғҢпјү

дёҖгҖҒElasticsearch еҹәзЎҖжҰӮеҝө

  1. ElasticsearchжҳҜд»Җд№Ҳпјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡејҖжәҗзҡ„еҲҶеёғејҸе…Ёж–Үжҗңзҙўеј•ж“ҺпјҢеҹәдәҺLuceneжһ„е»әпјҢж”ҜжҢҒй«ҳеҸҜз”ЁгҖҒй«ҳе№¶еҸ‘гҖҒе®һж—¶жЈҖзҙўдёҺеҲҶжһҗпјҢйҮҮз”ЁRESTful APIдәӨдә’пјҢйҖӮз”ЁдәҺжө·йҮҸж•°жҚ®зҡ„еҝ«йҖҹжҹҘиҜўдёҺз»ҹи®ЎгҖӮ

  2. ESе’Ң Solr зҡ„еҢәеҲ«пјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  е®һж—¶жҖ§пјҡES е®һж—¶жҖ§жӣҙејәпјҢиҝ‘е®һж—¶зҙўеј•пјҲз§’зә§еҸҜи§ҒпјүпјҢSolr е®һж—¶жҖ§иҫғејұпјӣв‘Ў еҲҶеёғејҸпјҡES еҺҹз”ҹж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶеёғејҸпјҢйғЁзҪІз»ҙжҠӨз®ҖеҚ•пјҢSolr йңҖдҫқиө–ZooKeeperе®һзҺ°еҲҶеёғејҸпјӣв‘ў йҖӮз”ЁеңәжҷҜпјҡES йҖӮеҗҲе®һж—¶жЈҖзҙўгҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—еҲҶжһҗпјҢSolr йҖӮеҗҲдј з»ҹе…Ёж–ҮжЈҖзҙўгҖҒйқҷжҖҒж•°жҚ®жҹҘиҜўпјӣв‘Ј зӨҫеҢәжҙ»и·ғеәҰпјҡES зӨҫеҢәжӣҙжҙ»и·ғпјҢжӣҙж–°иҝӯд»Јжӣҙеҝ«гҖӮ

  3. ESзҡ„ж ёеҝғзү№зӮ№жңүе“Әдәӣпјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  еҲҶеёғејҸжһ¶жһ„пјҡиҠӮзӮ№еҜ№зӯүпјҢиҮӘеҠЁеҲҶзүҮдёҺеүҜжң¬пјӣв‘Ў е…Ёж–ҮжЈҖзҙўпјҡж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶиҜҚгҖҒжЁЎзіҠеҢ№й…ҚгҖҒй«ҳдә®зӯүпјӣв‘ў е®һж—¶жҖ§пјҡиҝ‘е®һж—¶зҙўеј•дёҺжҹҘиҜўпјҢе»¶иҝҹдҪҺпјӣв‘Ј й«ҳеҸҜз”ЁпјҡеүҜжң¬жңәеҲ¶пјҢиҠӮзӮ№ж•…йҡңдёҚеҪұе“ҚжңҚеҠЎпјӣв‘Ө еӨҡз»ҙеәҰеҲҶжһҗпјҡж”ҜжҢҒиҒҡеҗҲз»ҹи®ЎгҖҒең°зҗҶдҪҚзҪ®жҹҘиҜўпјӣв‘Ҙ еҸҜжү©еұ•пјҡж°ҙе№іжү©е®№пјҢж”ҜжҢҒPBзә§ж•°жҚ®гҖӮ

  4. ESзҡ„й»ҳи®Өз«ҜеҸЈеҸ·жңүе“Әдәӣпјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  9200пјҡHTTPз«ҜеҸЈпјҢз”ЁдәҺRESTful APIдәӨдә’пјӣв‘Ў 9300пјҡTCPз«ҜеҸЈпјҢз”ЁдәҺйӣҶзҫӨиҠӮзӮ№й—ҙйҖҡдҝЎпјҲJavaе®ўжҲ·з«ҜиҝһжҺҘз«ҜеҸЈпјүгҖӮ

  5. ESзҡ„ж ёеҝғз»„д»¶жңүе“Әдәӣпјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡзҙўеј•пјҲIndexпјүгҖҒзұ»еһӢпјҲTypeпјҢ7.xеҗҺеәҹејғпјүгҖҒж–ҮжЎЈпјҲDocumentпјүгҖҒеӯ—ж®өпјҲFieldпјүгҖҒеҲҶзүҮпјҲShardпјүгҖҒеүҜжң¬пјҲReplicaпјүгҖҒйӣҶзҫӨпјҲClusterпјүгҖҒиҠӮзӮ№пјҲNodeпјүгҖӮ

  6. зҙўеј•гҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒеҲҶзүҮгҖҒеүҜжң¬зҡ„е…ізі»пјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  зҙўеј•пјҡеҗҢзұ»ж–ҮжЎЈзҡ„йӣҶеҗҲпјҢзұ»жҜ”ж•°жҚ®еә“зҡ„вҖңеә“вҖқпјӣв‘Ў ж–ҮжЎЈпјҡзҙўеј•зҡ„жңҖе°Ҹж•°жҚ®еҚ•е…ғпјҢзұ»жҜ”ж•°жҚ®еә“зҡ„вҖңиЎҢвҖқпјҢд»ҘJSONж јејҸеӯҳеӮЁпјӣв‘ў еҲҶзүҮпјҡзҙўеј•жӢҶеҲҶеҗҺзҡ„еӯҗйӣҶпјҢеҲҶеёғејҸеӯҳеӮЁеңЁдёҚеҗҢиҠӮзӮ№пјҢжҸҗеҚҮе№¶еҸ‘дёҺеӯҳеӮЁиғҪеҠӣпјӣв‘Ј еүҜжң¬пјҡеҲҶзүҮзҡ„еӨҮд»ҪпјҢдҝқйҡңй«ҳеҸҜз”ЁпјҢеҗҢж—¶еҲҶжӢ…жҹҘиҜўеҺӢеҠӣгҖӮ

  7. ESдёӯзҡ„иҠӮзӮ№зұ»еһӢжңүе“Әдәӣпјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  дё»иҠӮзӮ№пјҲMaster Nodeпјүпјҡз®ЎзҗҶйӣҶзҫӨе…ғж•°жҚ®пјҲзҙўеј•еҲӣе»әгҖҒеҲҶзүҮеҲҶй…ҚпјүпјҢдёҚеӨ„зҗҶж•°жҚ®иҜ»еҶҷпјӣв‘Ў ж•°жҚ®иҠӮзӮ№пјҲData NodeпјүпјҡеӯҳеӮЁж•°жҚ®пјҢеӨ„зҗҶзҙўеј•гҖҒжҹҘиҜўгҖҒиҒҡеҗҲж“ҚдҪңпјӣв‘ў еҚҸи°ғиҠӮзӮ№пјҲCoordinating NodeпјүпјҡжҺҘж”¶е®ўжҲ·з«ҜиҜ·жұӮпјҢеҲҶеҸ‘д»»еҠЎе№¶жұҮжҖ»з»“жһңпјҢй»ҳи®ӨжүҖжңүиҠӮзӮ№йғҪжҳҜеҚҸи°ғиҠӮзӮ№пјӣв‘Ј ingestиҠӮзӮ№пјҡж•°жҚ®еҶҷе…ҘеүҚзҡ„йў„еӨ„зҗҶпјҲеҰӮеҲҶиҜҚгҖҒеӯ—ж®өиҪ¬жҚўпјүгҖӮ

  8. ESйӣҶзҫӨзҡ„жңҖе°Ҹи§„жЁЎе»әи®®пјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡз”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғе»әи®®3дёӘиҠӮзӮ№пјҢ1дёӘдё»иҠӮзӮ№пјҲеҸҜй…ҚзҪ®еҖҷйҖүдё»иҠӮзӮ№пјү+2дёӘж•°жҚ®иҠӮзӮ№пјҢзЎ®дҝқеҲҶзүҮеүҜжң¬жӯЈеёёеҲҶй…ҚпјҢйҒҝе…ҚеҚ•зӮ№ж•…йҡңгҖӮ

  9. ES 7.x зүҲжң¬зҡ„ж ёеҝғеҸҳеҢ–пјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  еәҹејғTypeпјҡзҙўеј•дёӢд»…ж”ҜжҢҒеҚ•зұ»еһӢвҖң_docвҖқпјҢеҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨTypeжҰӮеҝөпјӣв‘Ў еўһејәе®үе…Ёзү№жҖ§пјҡй»ҳи®ӨејҖеҗҜе®үе…Ёж ЎйӘҢпјҢйңҖй…ҚзҪ®иҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз Ғпјӣв‘ў жҖ§иғҪдјҳеҢ–пјҡеҲҶиҜҚгҖҒжҹҘиҜўж•ҲзҺҮжҸҗеҚҮпјҢж”ҜжҢҒжӣҙй«ҳж•Ҳзҡ„иҒҡеҗҲпјӣв‘Ј ж–°еўһеҠҹиғҪпјҡеҰӮеҗ‘йҮҸжЈҖзҙўгҖҒж•°жҚ®з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹз®ЎзҗҶпјҲILMпјүгҖӮ

  10. ESе’Ңж•°жҚ®еә“пјҲMySQLпјүзҡ„еҢәеҲ«пјҹ

    зӯ”пјҡв‘  еӯҳеӮЁзӣ®зҡ„пјҡES з”ЁдәҺе…Ёж–ҮжЈҖзҙўдёҺеҝ«йҖҹеҲҶжһҗпјҢMySQL з”ЁдәҺз»“жһ„еҢ–ж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁдёҺдәӢеҠЎпјӣв‘Ў ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„пјҡES ж”ҜжҢҒйқһз»“жһ„еҢ–/еҚҠз»“жһ„еҢ–ж•°жҚ®пјҢMySQL ејәз»“жһ„еҢ–пјӣв‘ў жҹҘиҜўиғҪеҠӣпјҡES ж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶиҜҚгҖҒжЁЎзіҠжҹҘиҜўгҖҒиҒҡеҗҲпјҢMySQL йҖӮеҗҲзІҫзЎ®жҹҘиҜўдёҺиҒ”иЎЁпјӣв‘Ј дәӢеҠЎж”ҜжҢҒпјҡMySQL ж”ҜжҢҒACIDдәӢеҠЎпјҢES д»…ж”ҜжҢҒеҚ•ж–ҮжЎЈеҺҹеӯҗжҖ§пјҢж— еӨҚжқӮдәӢеҠЎгҖӮ

item.title: Elasticsearchзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-2
item.description:
жң¬ең°зҺҜеўғйғЁзҪІElasticsearch8.19.10 + Kibana8.19.10зҡ„дёҖд»Ҫе®Ңж•ҙгҖҒеҸҜзӣҙжҺҘиҗҪең°дҪҝз”Ёзҡ„ docker-compose.ymlпјҢе№¶дё”жҠҠ ES 8.19.x зҡ„е®үе…ЁжңәеҲ¶пјҲиҜҒд№ҰгҖҒHTTP/Transport SSLгҖҒKibana иҝһжҺҘе®үе…ЁпјүдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§й…ҚйҪҗпјҢйҖӮеҗҲ жң¬ең°зӣ®еҪ•жҢӮиҪҪ + дёүиҠӮзӮ№йӣҶзҫӨ + еҚ•иҠӮзӮ№еҜ№еӨ–жҡҙйңІ зҡ„еңәжҷҜгҖӮ

жҢү е®ҳж–№жҺЁиҚҗзҡ„вҖңиҮӘзӯҫ CA + иҠӮзӮ№иҜҒд№ҰвҖқж–№жЎҲ пјҢдёҚиө° enrollment tokenпјҢжӣҙеҸҜжҺ§пјҢд№ҹж–№дҫҝй•ҝжңҹз»ҙжҠӨгҖӮ

дёҖгҖҒзӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„пјҲйқһеёёйҮҚиҰҒпјү

item.title: Elasticsearchзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description: Elasticsearch еёёз”ЁзҹҘиҜҶзӮ№

item.title: Dockerзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description:
Docker жһ¶жһ„зӨәж„Ҹеӣҫ

рҹҗі Docker е‘Ҫд»ӨеӨ§е…ЁпјҲе®Ңж•ҙзүҲпјү

йҖӮз”ЁдәҺ Docker CLIпјҲ20.x+ зүҲжң¬пјүпјҢж¶өзӣ–е®№еҷЁгҖҒй•ңеғҸгҖҒзҪ‘з»ңгҖҒеҚ·гҖҒCompose зӯүж ёеҝғж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ
жңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°пјҡ2026е№ҙ1жңҲ

зӣ®еҪ•

  • дёҖгҖҒе®№еҷЁз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹз®ЎзҗҶ
  • дәҢгҖҒе®№еҷЁж“ҚдҪңпјҲInspect / Logs / Execпјү
  • дёүгҖҒе®№еҷЁзҡ„ RootFS зӣёе…іе‘Ҫд»Ө
  • еӣӣгҖҒжң¬ең°й•ңеғҸз®ЎзҗҶ
  • дә”гҖҒй•ңеғҸд»“еә“пјҲRegistryпјүж“ҚдҪң
  • е…ӯгҖҒзі»з»ҹдҝЎжҒҜдёҺзүҲжң¬
  • дёғгҖҒзҪ‘з»ңе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҲNetworkпјү
  • е…«гҖҒеҚ·е‘Ҫд»ӨпјҲVolumeпјү
  • д№қгҖҒDocker Compose е‘Ҫд»Ө
  • еҚҒгҖҒе…¶д»–е®һз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө
  • йҷ„пјҡеёёз”ЁйҖүйЎ№йҖҹжҹҘ

дёҖгҖҒе®№еҷЁз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹз®ЎзҗҶ

е‘Ҫд»Ө иҜҙжҳҺ
docker create [OPTIONS] IMAGE [COMMAND] [ARG...] еҲӣе»әе®№еҷЁдҪҶдёҚеҗҜеҠЁ
docker run [OPTIONS] IMAGE [COMMAND] [ARG...] еҲӣе»әе№¶еҗҜеҠЁе®№еҷЁ
docker start [CONTAINER...] еҗҜеҠЁе·ІеҒңжӯўзҡ„е®№еҷЁ
docker stop [CONTAINER...] дјҳйӣ…еҒңжӯўиҝҗиЎҢдёӯзҡ„е®№еҷЁпјҲSIGTERM вҶ’ SIGKILLпјү
docker restart [CONTAINER...] йҮҚеҗҜе®№еҷЁ
docker kill [CONTAINER...] ејәеҲ¶з»Ҳжӯўе®№еҷЁпјҲй»ҳи®Ө SIGKILLпјү
docker pause [CONTAINER...] жҡӮеҒңе®№еҷЁеҶ…жүҖжңүиҝӣзЁӢ
docker unpause [CONTAINER...] жҒўеӨҚжҡӮеҒңзҡ„е®№еҷЁ
docker rm [CONTAINER...] еҲ йҷӨе·ІеҒңжӯўзҡ„е®№еҷЁ
docker container prune еҲ йҷӨжүҖжңүе·ІеҒңжӯўзҡ„е®№еҷЁ

рҹ’Ў жҸҗзӨәпјҡdocker run --rm еҸҜеңЁе®№еҷЁйҖҖеҮәеҗҺиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨгҖӮ

item.title: GoиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-4
item.description:
еңЁ Go иҜӯиЁҖдёӯпјҢжңҖе№ҝжіӣдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„йӘҢиҜҒеә“жҳҜ go-playground/validatorпјҲйҖҡеёёз®Җз§°дёә validatorпјүгҖӮе®ғеҠҹиғҪејәеӨ§гҖҒжҖ§иғҪдјҳз§ҖпјҢж”ҜжҢҒеҸҳйҮҸйӘҢиҜҒгҖҒз»“жһ„дҪ“еӯ—ж®өйӘҢиҜҒгҖҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үйӘҢиҜҒи§„еҲҷгҖҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үй”ҷиҜҜж¶ҲжҒҜзӯүгҖӮ

рҹ“Ұ 1. е®үиЈ…

1go get github.com/go-playground/validator/v10

жіЁж„Ҹпјҡv10 жҳҜеҪ“еүҚдё»жөҒзүҲжң¬пјҲжҲӘиҮі Go 1.23пјүпјҢеҜје…Ҙи·Ҝеҫ„дёә github.com/go-playground/validator/v10

рҹ§Ә 2. еҹәжң¬з”Ёжі•пјҡйӘҢиҜҒеҚ•дёӘеҸҳйҮҸ

иҷҪз„¶ validator дё»иҰҒз”ЁдәҺз»“жһ„дҪ“пјҢдҪҶд№ҹеҸҜз”ЁдәҺеҚ•дёӘеҖјпјҡ

 1package main
 2
 3import (
 4    "fmt"
 5    "github.com/go-playground/validator/v10"
 6)
 7
 8func main() {
 9    validate := validator.New()
10
11    var email string = "invalid-email"
12    err := validate.Var(email, "required,email")
13    if err != nil {
14        fmt.Println("йӘҢиҜҒеӨұиҙҘ:", err)
15    }
16}

вң… Var(value interface{}, tag string)пјҡеҜ№еҚ•дёӘеҸҳйҮҸеә”з”ЁйӘҢиҜҒж ҮзӯҫгҖӮ

item.title: GoиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-3
item.description:
еңЁ Go иҜӯиЁҖдёӯпјҢжІЎжңүзӣҙжҺҘиҝһжҺҘ MySQL зҡ„ж ҮеҮҶеә“пјҢдҪҶ Go жҸҗдҫӣдәҶејәеӨ§зҡ„ж•°жҚ®еә“жҠҪиұЎжҺҘеҸЈ database/sqlпјҲеұһдәҺж ҮеҮҶеә“пјүпјҢе®ғе®ҡд№үдәҶдёҖеҘ—йҖҡз”Ёзҡ„ API з”ЁдәҺж“ҚдҪңе…ізі»еһӢж•°жҚ®еә“пјҲеҰӮ MySQLгҖҒPostgreSQLгҖҒSQLite зӯүпјүгҖӮ

иҰҒиҝһжҺҘ MySQLпјҢдҪ йңҖиҰҒпјҡ

  1. дҪҝз”Ёж ҮеҮҶеә“ database/sql зј–еҶҷд»Јз Ғпјӣ
  2. жҗӯй…ҚдёҖдёӘ MySQL й©ұеҠЁпјҲDriverпјү вҖ”вҖ” иҝҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘз¬¬дёүж–№еҢ…пјҢе®һзҺ°дәҶ database/sql/driver жҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ

вң… жӯЈзЎ®е§ҝеҠҝпјҡdatabase/sql + MySQL Driver

1. ж ҮеҮҶеә“ database/sql

  • жҸҗдҫӣз»ҹдёҖжҺҘеҸЈпјҡsql.Open, db.Query, db.Exec, db.Prepare зӯүгҖӮ
  • дёҚеҢ…еҗ«е…·дҪ“ж•°жҚ®еә“й©ұеҠЁпјҢйңҖй…ҚеҗҲй©ұеҠЁдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒиҝһжҺҘжұ гҖҒйў„зј–иҜ‘иҜӯеҸҘгҖҒдәӢеҠЎзӯүгҖӮ

2. жҺЁиҚҗзҡ„ MySQL й©ұеҠЁпјҡgo-sql-driver/mysql

  • GitHub: https://github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql
  • жңҖжөҒиЎҢгҖҒз»ҙжҠӨжҙ»и·ғгҖҒеҠҹиғҪе®Ңж•ҙгҖҒзәҜ Go е®һзҺ°пјҲж—  C дҫқиө–пјүгҖӮ
  • з¬ҰеҗҲ database/sql/driver жҺҘеҸЈи§„иҢғгҖӮ

рҹ“Ң иҝҷжҳҜ Go зӨҫеҢәдәӢе®һдёҠзҡ„ж ҮеҮҶ MySQL й©ұеҠЁгҖӮ

рҹӣ пёҸ дҪҝз”ЁзӨәдҫӢ

з¬¬дёҖжӯҘпјҡе®үиЈ…й©ұеҠЁ

1go get -u github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql

вҡ пёҸ жіЁж„ҸпјҡдҪ дёҚйңҖиҰҒеңЁд»Јз ҒдёӯжҳҫејҸ import й©ұеҠЁеҢ…жқҘи°ғз”Ёе®ғзҡ„еҮҪж•°пјҢдҪҶеҝ…йЎ»йҖҡиҝҮ _ з©әеҜје…ҘпјҲblank importпјүжіЁеҶҢй©ұеҠЁпјҡ

item.title: GoиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-2
item.description:
Go иҜӯиЁҖж ҮеҮҶеә“дёӯзҡ„ net/http еҢ…жҸҗдҫӣдәҶ HTTP е®ўжҲ·з«ҜпјҲclientпјүе’Ң HTTP жңҚеҠЎз«ҜпјҲserverпјү зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙе®һзҺ°пјҢж— йңҖдҫқиө–з¬¬дёүж–№еә“еҚіеҸҜжһ„е»әй«ҳжҖ§иғҪзҡ„ Web еә”з”ЁжҲ–еҸ‘иө· HTTP иҜ·жұӮгҖӮ

вң… 1. HTTP жңҚеҠЎз«ҜпјҲServerпјү

дҪ еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё net/http иҪ»жқҫеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘ Web жңҚеҠЎеҷЁпјҡ

 1package main
 2
 3import (
 4    "fmt"
 5    "net/http"
 6)
 7
 8func handler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 9    fmt.Fprintf(w, "Hello, you've requested: %s\n", r.URL.Path)
10}
11
12func main() {
13    http.HandleFunc("/", handler)
14    fmt.Println("Starting server on :8080")
15    http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil)
16}
  • http.HandleFuncпјҡжіЁеҶҢи·Ҝз”ұеӨ„зҗҶеҮҪж•°гҖӮ
  • http.ListenAndServeпјҡеҗҜеҠЁ HTTP жңҚеҠЎзӣ‘еҗ¬жҢҮе®ҡз«ҜеҸЈгҖӮ
  • http.ResponseWriter е’Ң *http.Requestпјҡз”ЁдәҺе“Қеә”е’ҢиҜ»еҸ–иҜ·жұӮгҖӮ

дҪ д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁиҮӘе®ҡд№үзҡ„ http.Handler жҺҘеҸЈе®һзҺ°жӣҙеӨҚжқӮзҡ„йҖ»иҫ‘гҖӮ

item.title: GoиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description:
еҹәжң¬зұ»еһӢд»Ӣз»Қ

Golang жӣҙжҳҺзЎ®зҡ„ж•°еӯ—зұ»еһӢе‘ҪеҗҚпјҢж”ҜжҢҒ UnicodeпјҢж”ҜжҢҒеёёз”Ёж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„гҖӮ

зұ»еһӢ й•ҝеәҰ(еӯ—иҠӮ) й»ҳи®ӨеҖј иҜҙжҳҺ
bool 1 false
byte 1 0 uint8
rune 4 0 Unicode Code Point, int32
int, uint 4жҲ–8 0 32 жҲ– 64 дҪҚ
int8, uint8 1 0 -128 ~ 127, 0 ~ 255пјҢbyteжҳҜuint8 зҡ„еҲ«еҗҚ
int16, uint16 2 0 -32768 ~ 32767, 0 ~ 65535
int32, uint32 4 0 -21дәҝ~ 21дәҝ, 0 ~ 42дәҝпјҢruneжҳҜint32 зҡ„еҲ«еҗҚ
int64, uint64 8 0
float32 4 0.0
float64 8 0.0
complex64 8
complex128 16
uintptr 4жҲ–8 д»ҘеӯҳеӮЁжҢҮй’Ҳзҡ„ uint32 жҲ– uint64 ж•ҙж•°
array еҖјзұ»еһӢ
struct еҖјзұ»еһӢ
string вҖңвҖқ UTF-8 еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
slice nil еј•з”Ёзұ»еһӢ
map nil еј•з”Ёзұ»еһӢ
channel nil еј•з”Ёзұ»еһӢ
interface nil жҺҘеҸЈ
function nil еҮҪж•°

ж”ҜжҢҒе…«иҝӣеҲ¶гҖҒ е…ӯиҝӣеҲ¶пјҢд»ҘеҸҠз§‘еӯҰи®°ж•°жі•гҖӮж ҮеҮҶеә“ math е®ҡд№үдәҶеҗ„ж•°еӯ—зұ»еһӢеҸ–еҖјиҢғеӣҙгҖӮ

item.title: GoиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№--GOPATHе’ҢGo Modules
item.description:
еңЁ Go иҜӯиЁҖзҡ„еҸ‘еұ•еҺҶзЁӢдёӯпјҢGOPATH е’Ң Go ModulesпјҲжЁЎеқ—зі»з»ҹпјү жҳҜдёӨз§ҚдёҚеҗҢзҡ„дҫқиө–з®ЎзҗҶе’ҢйЎ№зӣ®з»„з»Үж–№ејҸгҖӮе®ғд»¬д»ЈиЎЁдәҶ Go еңЁдёҚеҗҢйҳ¶ж®өеҜ№вҖңеҰӮдҪ•жһ„е»әе’Ңз®ЎзҗҶйЎ№зӣ®вҖқзҡ„е“ІеӯҰжј”еҸҳгҖӮ

дёӢйқўжҳҜеҜ№ GOPATH е’Ң Go Modules зҡ„иҜҰз»ҶеҜ№жҜ”еҲҶжһҗпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬и®ҫи®ЎжҖқжғігҖҒе·ҘдҪңжңәеҲ¶гҖҒдјҳзјәзӮ№гҖҒдҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜд»ҘеҸҠеҪ“еүҚзҡ„дё»жөҒи¶ӢеҠҝгҖӮ

дёҖгҖҒиғҢжҷҜпјҡGo зҡ„дҫқиө–з®ЎзҗҶжј”иҝӣ

ж—¶й—ҙ зүҲжң¬ дҫқиө–з®ЎзҗҶж–№ејҸ
2009вҖ“2018 Go 1.0 вҖ“ Go 1.10 GOPATH жЁЎејҸ
2018 е№ҙиө· Go 1.11+ еј•е…Ҙ Go Modules
2020 е№ҙиө· Go 1.14+ Modules жҲҗдёәжҺЁиҚҗж–№ејҸ
2021 е№ҙиө· Go 1.16+ Modules й»ҳи®ӨеҗҜз”Ё

рҹ“Ң иҮӘ Go 1.16 иө·пјҢGO111MODULE=on жҲҗдёәй»ҳи®ӨиЎҢдёәпјҢж Үеҝ—зқҖ Go Modules жӯЈејҸеҸ–д»Ј GOPATH жҲҗдёәдё»жөҒгҖӮ

дәҢгҖҒGOPATH жЁЎејҸиҜҰи§Ј

1. д»Җд№ҲжҳҜ GOPATHпјҹ

GOPATH жҳҜдёҖдёӘзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢжҢҮеҗ‘дҪ зҡ„ Go е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮе®ғе®ҡд№үдәҶ Go е·Ҙе…·й“ҫжҹҘжүҫеҢ…зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ

е…ёеһӢз»“жһ„пјҡ

item.title: RabbitMQж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯй—ҙд»¶иҜҰи§Ј
item.description:
RabbitMQ ж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯй—ҙд»¶иҜҰи§Ј

з»„д»¶д»Ӣз»Қ

  1. Broker:е®ғжҸҗдҫӣдёҖз§Қдј иҫ“жңҚеҠЎ,е®ғзҡ„и§’иүІе°ұжҳҜз»ҙжҠӨдёҖжқЎд»Һз”ҹдә§иҖ…еҲ°ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…зҡ„и·ҜзәҝпјҢдҝқиҜҒж•°жҚ®иғҪжҢүз…§жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ж–№ејҸиҝӣиЎҢдј иҫ“,
  2. Exchangeпјҡж¶ҲжҒҜдәӨжҚўжңә,е®ғжҢҮе®ҡж¶ҲжҒҜжҢүд»Җд№Ҳи§„еҲҷ,и·Ҝз”ұеҲ°е“ӘдёӘйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮ
  3. Queue:ж¶ҲжҒҜзҡ„иҪҪдҪ“,жҜҸдёӘж¶ҲжҒҜйғҪдјҡиў«жҠ•еҲ°дёҖдёӘжҲ–еӨҡдёӘйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮ
  4. Binding:з»‘е®ҡпјҢе®ғзҡ„дҪңз”Ёе°ұжҳҜжҠҠexchangeе’ҢqueueжҢүз…§и·Ҝз”ұи§„еҲҷз»‘е®ҡиө·жқҘ.
  5. Routing Key:и·Ҝз”ұе…ій”®еӯ—,exchangeж №жҚ®иҝҷдёӘе…ій”®еӯ—иҝӣиЎҢж¶ҲжҒҜжҠ•йҖ’гҖӮ
  6. vhost:иҷҡжӢҹдё»жңә,дёҖдёӘbrokerйҮҢеҸҜд»ҘжңүеӨҡдёӘvhostпјҢз”ЁдҪңдёҚеҗҢз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„жқғйҷҗеҲҶзҰ»гҖӮ
  7. Producer:ж¶ҲжҒҜз”ҹдә§иҖ…,е°ұжҳҜжҠ•йҖ’ж¶ҲжҒҜзҡ„зЁӢеәҸ.
  8. Consumer:ж¶ҲжҒҜж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…,е°ұжҳҜжҺҘеҸ—ж¶ҲжҒҜзҡ„зЁӢеәҸ.
  9. Channel:ж¶ҲжҒҜйҖҡйҒ“,еңЁе®ўжҲ·з«Ҝзҡ„жҜҸдёӘиҝһжҺҘйҮҢ,еҸҜе»әз«ӢеӨҡдёӘchannel.

дёҖ. еҰӮдҪ•еҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜ

  1. з”ҹдә§иҖ…е’ҢBrokerе»әз«ӢTCPиҝһжҺҘ
  2. з”ҹдә§иҖ…е’ҢBrokerе»әз«ӢйҖҡйҒ“
  3. з”ҹдә§иҖ…йҖҡиҝҮйҖҡйҒ“ж¶ҲжҒҜеҸ‘йҖҒз»ҷBrokerпјҢз”ұExchangeе°Ҷж¶ҲжҒҜиҝӣиЎҢиҪ¬еҸ‘
  4. Exchangeе°Ҷж¶ҲжҒҜиҪ¬еҸ‘еҲ°жӯўи·ҢйӮЈдёӘзҡ„QueueпјҲйҳҹеҲ—пјү

дәҢ.еҰӮдҪ•жҺҘж”¶ж¶ҲжҒҜ

  1. ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…е’ҢBrokerе»әз«ӢTCPиҝһжҺҘ
  2. ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…е’ҢBrokerе»әз«ӢйҖҡйҒ“
  3. ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…зӣ‘еҗ¬еҲ¶е®ҡзҡ„QueueпјҲйҳҹеҲ—пјү
  4. еҪ“жңүж¶ҲжҒҜеҲ°иҫҫQueueж—¶Brokerй»ҳи®Өе°Ҷж¶ҲжҒҜжҺЁйҖҒз»ҷж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…
  5. ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…жҺҘеҸ—еҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜ

ж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯй—ҙд»¶зҡ„дҪңз”Ё

  • еүҠеі°пјҡзј“еҶІзһ¬ж—¶й«ҳеі°жөҒйҮҸпјҢйҒҝе…Қзі»з»ҹиў«еҶІеһ®
  • и§ЈиҖҰпјҡйҷҚдҪҺзі»з»ҹй—ҙиҖҰеҗҲеәҰпјҢжҸҗй«ҳеҸҜз»ҙжҠӨжҖ§
  • ејӮжӯҘйҖҡдҝЎпјҡжҸҗй«ҳзі»з»ҹе“Қеә”йҖҹеәҰпјҢеҮҸе°‘зӯүеҫ…ж—¶й—ҙ
  • йЎәеәҸдҝқиҜҒпјҡзЎ®дҝқж¶ҲжҒҜжҢүзү№е®ҡйЎәеәҸеӨ„зҗҶ
  • ж•°жҚ®еҶ—дҪҷпјҡжҸҗдҫӣж¶ҲжҒҜжҢҒд№…еҢ–пјҢйҳІжӯўж•°жҚ®дёўеӨұ
  • зі»з»ҹжү©еұ•пјҡдҫҝдәҺзі»з»ҹж°ҙе№іжү©еұ•

AMQP й«ҳзә§ж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—еҚҸи®®

AMQPпјҲAdvanced Message Queuing ProtocolпјүжҳҜдёҖдёӘжҸҗдҫӣз»ҹдёҖж¶ҲжҒҜжңҚеҠЎзҡ„еә”з”ЁеұӮж ҮеҮҶеҚҸи®®гҖӮ

дәӨжҚўеҷЁ (Exchange)

дәӨжҚўеҷЁзү№жҖ§

  • дәӨжҚўеҷЁдёҺдәӨжҚўеҷЁеҸҜд»Ҙзӣёдә’з»‘е®ҡ

дәӨжҚўеҷЁзұ»еһӢ

  • direct жҳҜжңҖз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„жЁЎејҸ.еҚіеҲӣе»әж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷ,жҢҮе®ҡдёҖдёӘи·Ҝз”ұй”®пјҲRoutingKeyпјү.еҪ“еҸ‘йҖҒиҖ…еҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷ,жҢҮе®ҡеҜ№еә”зҡ„Key.еҪ“Keyе’Ңж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—зҡ„RoutingKeyдёҖиҮҙзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷ,ж¶ҲжҒҜе°Ҷдјҡиў«еҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°иҜҘж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—дёӯ.
  • topic topicиҪ¬еҸ‘дҝЎжҒҜдё»иҰҒжҳҜдҫқжҚ®йҖҡй…Қз¬Ұ,йҳҹеҲ—е’ҢдәӨжҚўжңәзҡ„з»‘е®ҡдё»иҰҒжҳҜдҫқжҚ®дёҖз§ҚжЁЎејҸ(йҖҡй…Қз¬Ұ+еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ),иҖҢеҪ“еҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷ,еҸӘжңүжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„Keyе’ҢиҜҘжЁЎејҸзӣёеҢ№й…Қзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷ,ж¶ҲжҒҜжүҚдјҡиў«еҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°иҜҘж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—дёӯ.йҖҡй…Қз¬Ұпјҡ*В иЎЁзӨәдёҖдёӘиҜҚпјҢ#В иЎЁзӨәйӣ¶дёӘжҲ–еӨҡдёӘиҜҚ
  • fanout fanoutжҳҜи·Ҝз”ұе№ҝж’ӯзҡ„еҪўејҸ,е°ҶдјҡжҠҠж¶ҲжҒҜеҸ‘з»ҷз»‘е®ҡе®ғзҡ„е…ЁйғЁйҳҹеҲ—,еҚідҫҝи®ҫзҪ®дәҶkey,д№ҹдјҡиў«еҝҪз•Ҙ.еӣ жӯӨжҲ‘д»¬еҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°дәӨжҚўжңәзҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜдјҡдҪҝеҫ—з»‘е®ҡеҲ°иҜҘдәӨжҚўжңәзҡ„жҜҸдёҖдёӘQueueжҺҘж”¶еҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜ,иҝҷдёӘж—¶еҖҷе°ұз®—жҢҮе®ҡдәҶи·Ҝз”ұй”®пјҲroutingKeyпјү,жҲ–иҖ…и§„еҲҷ(еҚідёҠж–ҮдёӯconvertAndSendж–№жі•зҡ„еҸӮж•°2),д№ҹдјҡиў«еҝҪз•Ҙ!
  • header
  • system
  • иҮӘе®ҡд№ү

дәӨжҚўеҷЁеұһжҖ§

  • жҢҒд№…еҢ–пјҡdurable еҸӮж•°и®©дәӨжҚўеҷЁеӯҳзӣҳ
  • иҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨпјҡеҪ“жүҖжңүз»‘е®ҡзҡ„йҳҹеҲ—жҲ–дәӨжҚўеҷЁйғҪи§Јз»‘еҗҺиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨ(иҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨзҡ„еүҚжҸҗжҳҜиҮіе°‘жңүдёҖдёӘйҳҹеҲ—жҲ–иҖ…дәӨжҚўеҷЁдёҺиҝҷдёӘдәӨжҚўеҷЁз»‘е®ҡпјҢд№ӢеҗҺжүҖжңүдёҺиҝҷдёӘдәӨжҚўеҷЁз»‘е®ҡзҡ„йҳҹеҲ—жҲ–иҖ…дәӨжҚўеҷЁйғҪдёҺжӯӨи§Јз»‘гҖӮ)

йҳҹеҲ— (Queue)

йҳҹеҲ—зү№жҖ§

  • йҳҹеҲ—дёҺдәӨжҚўеҷЁиҝӣиЎҢз»‘е®ҡ

йҳҹеҲ—еұһжҖ§

  • жҢҒд№…еҢ–пјҡdurable еҸӮж•°и®©йҳҹеҲ—еӯҳзӣҳ
  • жҺ’д»–жҖ§пјҡexclusive еҸӮж•°дҪҝйҳҹеҲ—д»…еҜ№йҰ–ж¬ЎеЈ°жҳҺе®ғзҡ„иҝһжҺҘеҸҜи§ҒпјҢиҝһжҺҘж–ӯејҖж—¶иҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨ
  • иҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨпјҡеҪ“жүҖжңүж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…йғҪж–ӯејҖиҝһжҺҘж—¶иҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨ(иҮіе°‘жңүдёҖдёӘж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…иҝһжҺҘеҲ°иҝҷдёӘйҳҹеҲ—пјҢд№ӢеҗҺжүҖжңүдёҺиҝҷдёӘйҳҹеҲ—иҝһжҺҘзҡ„ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…йғҪж–ӯејҖж—¶пјҢжүҚдјҡиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨ)

еЈ°жҳҺжңәеҲ¶

з”ҹдә§иҖ…е’Ңж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…йғҪеҸҜд»ҘеЈ°жҳҺдәӨжҚўеҷЁжҲ–йҳҹеҲ—пјҡ

item.title: PHPиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-4
item.description:
еңЁ PHP дёӯпјҢй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјҲINI й…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјүе…·жңүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„дҪңз”ЁеҹҹпјҲINI ScopeпјүпјҢиҝҷеҶіе®ҡдәҶиҜҘй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№еҸҜд»ҘеңЁе“Әдәӣең°ж–№иў«дҝ®ж”№гҖӮPHP е®ҡд№үдәҶд»ҘдёӢеҮ з§ҚдҪңз”ЁеҹҹеёёйҮҸпјҲе®ҡд№үеңЁ php.ini зҡ„дёҠдёӢж–Үдёӯпјүпјҡ

1. PHP_INI_USER

  • еҗ«д№үпјҡеҸҜд»ҘеңЁз”ЁжҲ·и„ҡжң¬дёӯйҖҡиҝҮ ini_set() еҠЁжҖҒдҝ®ж”№гҖӮ
  • еҸҜдҝ®ж”№дҪҚзҪ®пјҡ
    • .htaccessпјҲApacheпјү
    • httpd.conf дёӯзҡ„ <Directory>гҖҒ<Location> зӯүпјҲеҰӮжһңе…Ғи®ёпјү
    • PHP и„ҡжң¬дёӯдҪҝз”Ё ini_set()
  • зӨәдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјҡdisplay_errorsгҖҒerror_reportingгҖҒmemory_limitпјҲйғЁеҲҶзүҲжң¬пјү

2. PHP_INI_PERDIR

  • еҗ«д№үпјҡеҸҜд»ҘеңЁзӣ®еҪ•еұӮзә§зҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯи®ҫзҪ®пјҢдҪҶдёҚиғҪеңЁиҝҗиЎҢж—¶йҖҡиҝҮ ini_set() дҝ®ж”№гҖӮ
  • еҸҜдҝ®ж”№дҪҚзҪ®пјҡ
    • php.ini
    • .htaccessпјҲApacheпјү
    • httpd.conf дёӯзҡ„ <Directory>гҖҒ<VirtualHost> зӯү
  • дёҚеҸҜеңЁ PHP и„ҡжң¬дёӯз”Ё ini_set() дҝ®ж”№
  • зӨәдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјҡupload_max_filesizeгҖҒpost_max_size

3. PHP_INI_SYSTEM

  • еҗ«д№үпјҡеҸӘиғҪеңЁзі»з»ҹзә§й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯи®ҫзҪ®пјҢеҜ№ж•ҙдёӘ PHP зҺҜеўғз”ҹж•ҲгҖӮ
  • еҸҜдҝ®ж”№дҪҚзҪ®пјҡ
    • php.ini
    • Web жңҚеҠЎеҷЁдё»й…ҚзҪ®пјҲеҰӮ Apache зҡ„ httpd.conf дёӯзҡ„ PHPIniDir жҲ– php_admin_valueпјү
  • дёҚеҸҜеңЁ .htaccess жҲ– PHP и„ҡжң¬дёӯдҝ®ж”№
  • зӨәдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјҡextension_dirгҖҒsafe_modeпјҲе·ІеәҹејғпјүгҖҒenable_dl

4. PHP_INI_ALL

  • еҗ«д№үпјҡзӯүд»·дәҺ PHP_INI_USER | PHP_INI_PERDIR | PHP_INI_SYSTEMпјҢеҚіжүҖжңүең°ж–№йғҪеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҫзҪ®гҖӮ
  • е®һйҷ…дёҠпјҢиҝҷжҳҜжҹҗдәӣй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№зҡ„вҖңе®ҪжқҫвҖқдҪңз”ЁеҹҹгҖӮ
  • еҸҜеңЁ PHP и„ҡжң¬дёӯз”Ё ini_set() дҝ®ж”№
  • зӨәдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№пјҡdate.timezoneпјҲеңЁиҫғж–°зүҲжң¬дёӯпјү

вҡ пёҸ жіЁж„ҸпјҡдёҚжҳҜжүҖжңүж–ҮжЎЈйғҪжҳҺзЎ®еҲ—еҮәжҜҸдёӘй…ҚзҪ®йЎ№зҡ„дҪңз”ЁеҹҹпјҢдҪҶеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮ phpinfo() жҲ– ini_get_all() жҹҘзңӢгҖӮ

item.title: PHPиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-3
item.description:
еңЁ PHP зҡ„иҮӘеҠЁеҠ иҪҪпјҲAutoloadingпјүжңәеҲ¶дёӯпјҢжңүеҮ з§Қеёёи§Ғзҡ„ж–№ејҸз”ЁдәҺеҠ иҪҪзұ»ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҢ…жӢ¬ PSR-0гҖҒPSR-4гҖҒclassmap е’Ң files includesгҖӮе®ғд»¬еҗ„иҮӘжңүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜе’Ңе®һзҺ°ж–№ејҸгҖӮ

1. PSR-0пјҲе·Іеәҹејғпјү

з®Җд»Ӣпјҡ

PSR-0 жҳҜ PHP-FIGпјҲPHP Framework Interop GroupпјүжңҖж—©жҸҗеҮәзҡ„иҮӘеҠЁеҠ иҪҪи§„иҢғпјҢзҺ°е·Іиў« PSR-4 еҸ–д»Је№¶еәҹејғпјҢдҪҶдёҖдәӣиҖҒйЎ№зӣ®д»ҚеңЁдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ

и§„еҲҷпјҡ

  • зұ»еҗҚеҝ…йЎ»жҳ е°„еҲ°ж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹи·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
  • дёӢеҲ’зәҝ _ иў«и§Ҷдёәзӣ®еҪ•еҲҶйҡ”з¬ҰгҖӮ
  • е‘ҪеҗҚз©әй—ҙеҲҶйҡ”з¬Ұ \ д№ҹиў«и§Ҷдёәзӣ®еҪ•еҲҶйҡ”з¬ҰгҖӮ
  • ж–Үд»¶еҝ…йЎ»д»Ҙ .php з»“е°ҫгҖӮ

зӨәдҫӢпјҡ

1// зұ»пјҡVendor\Package\ClassName
2// еҜ№еә”и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡ/path/to/project/Vendor/Package/ClassName.php
3
4// жҲ–иҖ…еёҰдёӢеҲ’зәҝзҡ„зұ»пјҲж—§ејҸ PEAR йЈҺж јпјү
5// зұ»пјҡVendor_Package_ClassName
6// еҜ№еә”и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡ/path/to/project/Vendor/Package/ClassName.php

Composer дёӯзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®пјҲе·ІдёҚжҺЁиҚҗпјүпјҡ

1{
2    "autoload": {
3        "psr-0": {
4            "Vendor\\": "src/"
5        }
6    }
7}

вҡ пёҸ жіЁж„ҸпјҡPSR-0 дёҚж”ҜжҢҒзҒөжҙ»зҡ„зӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„пјҢжҜ”еҰӮдёҚиғҪе°Ҷ src/ зӣҙжҺҘжҳ е°„еҲ°е‘ҪеҗҚз©әй—ҙж №пјҢеҝ…йЎ»еҢ…еҗ« Vendor еҗҚгҖӮ

2. PSR-4пјҲзҺ°д»Јж ҮеҮҶпјү

з®Җд»Ӣпјҡ

PSR-4 жҳҜзӣ®еүҚжҺЁиҚҗзҡ„ж ҮеҮҶпјҢжӣҙеҠ зҒөжҙ»з®ҖжҙҒпјҢжҳҜзҺ°д»Ј PHP йЎ№зӣ®зҡ„йҰ–йҖүгҖӮ

и§„еҲҷпјҡ

  • е‘ҪеҗҚз©әй—ҙеүҚзјҖжҳ е°„еҲ°дёҖдёӘеҹәзЎҖзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮ
  • зұ»еҗҚзҡ„еү©дҪҷйғЁеҲҶзӣҙжҺҘеҜ№еә”еӯҗзӣ®еҪ•е’Ңж–Үд»¶еҗҚгҖӮ
  • дёҚеҶҚж”ҜжҢҒдёӢеҲ’зәҝ _ дҪңдёәи·Ҝеҫ„еҲҶйҡ”з¬ҰгҖӮ

зӨәдҫӢпјҡ

1// е‘ҪеҗҚз©әй—ҙпјҡApp\Controller\UserController
2// еҰӮжһңй…ҚзҪ®дәҶ "App\\": "src/"
3// еҲҷеҜ№еә”ж–Үд»¶и·Ҝеҫ„дёәпјҡsrc/Controller/UserController.php

Composer й…ҚзҪ®пјҡ

1{
2    "autoload": {
3        "psr-4": {
4            "App\\": "src/",
5            "MyLib\\": "lib/"
6        }
7    }
8}

вң… дјҳзӮ№пјҡз»“жһ„жё…жҷ°гҖҒж”ҜжҢҒд»»ж„Ҹж·ұеәҰзӣ®еҪ•гҖҒдёҺе‘ҪеҗҚз©әй—ҙе®ҢзҫҺеҘ‘еҗҲгҖӮ

item.title: PHPиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-2
item.description:
дёӢйқўжҳҜе°ҶдҪ жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„ Go иҜӯиЁҖд»Јз ҒпјҲHTTP зҠ¶жҖҒз ҒеёёйҮҸе’Ң StatusText еҮҪж•°пјүе®Ңж•ҙиҪ¬жҚўдёә PHP иҜӯиЁҖзҡ„е®һзҺ°гҖӮPHP дёӯжІЎжңүеҺҹз”ҹзҡ„ const еқ—пјҢдҪҶжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ё define() жҲ– class дёӯзҡ„ const жқҘе®ҡд№үеёёйҮҸпјҢжҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”Ёзұ»е°ҒиЈ…зҡ„ж–№ејҸжӣҙжё…жҷ°гҖӮ

вң… PHP е®һзҺ°пјҡHTTP зҠ¶жҖҒз ҒеёёйҮҸ + зҠ¶жҖҒж–Үжң¬еҮҪж•°

  1<?php
  2
  3class HttpStatus
  4{
  5    // 1xx Informational
  6    const StatusContinue                   = 100;
  7    const StatusSwitchingProtocols         = 101;
  8    const StatusProcessing                 = 102;
  9    const StatusEarlyHints                 = 103;
 10
 11    // 2xx Success
 12    const StatusOK                         = 200;
 13    const StatusCreated                    = 201;
 14    const StatusAccepted                   = 202;
 15    const StatusNonAuthoritativeInfo       = 203;
 16    const StatusNoContent                  = 204;
 17    const StatusResetContent               = 205;
 18    const StatusPartialContent             = 206;
 19    const StatusMultiStatus                = 207;
 20    const StatusAlreadyReported            = 208;
 21    const StatusIMUsed                     = 226;
 22
 23    // 3xx Redirection
 24    const StatusMultipleChoices            = 300;
 25    const StatusMovedPermanently           = 301;
 26    const StatusFound                      = 302;
 27    const StatusSeeOther                   = 303;
 28    const StatusNotModified                = 304;
 29    const StatusUseProxy                   = 305;
 30    // 306 is unused, skipped
 31    const StatusTemporaryRedirect          = 307;
 32    const StatusPermanentRedirect          = 308;
 33
 34    // 4xx Client Error
 35    const StatusBadRequest                 = 400;
 36    const StatusUnauthorized               = 401;
 37    const StatusPaymentRequired            = 402;
 38    const StatusForbidden                  = 403;
 39    const StatusNotFound                   = 404;
 40    const StatusMethodNotAllowed           = 405;
 41    const StatusNotAcceptable              = 406;
 42    const StatusProxyAuthRequired          = 407;
 43    const StatusRequestTimeout             = 408;
 44    const StatusConflict                   = 409;
 45    const StatusGone                       = 410;
 46    const StatusLengthRequired             = 411;
 47    const StatusPreconditionFailed         = 412;
 48    const StatusRequestEntityTooLarge      = 413;
 49    const StatusRequestURITooLong          = 414;
 50    const StatusUnsupportedMediaType       = 415;
 51    const StatusRequestedRangeNotSatisfiable = 416;
 52    const StatusExpectationFailed          = 417;
 53    const StatusTeapot                     = 418;
 54    const StatusMisdirectedRequest         = 421;
 55    const StatusUnprocessableEntity        = 422;
 56    const StatusLocked                     = 423;
 57    const StatusFailedDependency           = 424;
 58    const StatusTooEarly                   = 425;
 59    const StatusUpgradeRequired            = 426;
 60    const StatusPreconditionRequired       = 428;
 61    const StatusTooManyRequests            = 429;
 62    const StatusRequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge = 431;
 63    const StatusUnavailableForLegalReasons = 451;
 64
 65    // 5xx Server Error
 66    const StatusInternalServerError        = 500;
 67    const StatusNotImplemented             = 501;
 68    const StatusBadGateway                 = 502;
 69    const StatusServiceUnavailable         = 503;
 70    const StatusGatewayTimeout             = 504;
 71    const StatusHTTPVersionNotSupported    = 505;
 72    const StatusVariantAlsoNegotiates      = 506;
 73    const StatusInsufficientStorage        = 507;
 74    const StatusLoopDetected               = 508;
 75    const StatusNotExtended                = 510;
 76    const StatusNetworkAuthenticationRequired = 511;
 77
 78    /**
 79     * Returns the reason phrase for the given HTTP status code.
 80     *
 81     * @param int $code HTTP status code
 82     * @return string The reason phrase, or empty string if unknown.
 83     */
 84    public static function statusText(int $code): string
 85    {
 86        return match ($code) {
 87            self::StatusContinue => 'Continue',
 88            self::StatusSwitchingProtocols => 'Switching Protocols',
 89            self::StatusProcessing => 'Processing',
 90            self::StatusEarlyHints => 'Early Hints',
 91
 92            self::StatusOK => 'OK',
 93            self::StatusCreated => 'Created',
 94            self::StatusAccepted => 'Accepted',
 95            self::StatusNonAuthoritativeInfo => 'Non-Authoritative Information',
 96            self::StatusNoContent => 'No Content',
 97            self::StatusResetContent => 'Reset Content',
 98            self::StatusPartialContent => 'Partial Content',
 99            self::StatusMultiStatus => 'Multi-Status',
100            self::StatusAlreadyReported => 'Already Reported',
101            self::StatusIMUsed => 'IM Used',
102
103            self::StatusMultipleChoices => 'Multiple Choices',
104            self::StatusMovedPermanently => 'Moved Permanently',
105            self::StatusFound => 'Found',
106            self::StatusSeeOther => 'See Other',
107            self::StatusNotModified => 'Not Modified',
108            self::StatusUseProxy => 'Use Proxy',
109            self::StatusTemporaryRedirect => 'Temporary Redirect',
110            self::StatusPermanentRedirect => 'Permanent Redirect',
111
112            self::StatusBadRequest => 'Bad Request',
113            self::StatusUnauthorized => 'Unauthorized',
114            self::StatusPaymentRequired => 'Payment Required',
115            self::StatusForbidden => 'Forbidden',
116            self::StatusNotFound => 'Not Found',
117            self::StatusMethodNotAllowed => 'Method Not Allowed',
118            self::StatusNotAcceptable => 'Not Acceptable',
119            self::StatusProxyAuthRequired => 'Proxy Authentication Required',
120            self::StatusRequestTimeout => 'Request Timeout',
121            self::StatusConflict => 'Conflict',
122            self::StatusGone => 'Gone',
123            self::StatusLengthRequired => 'Length Required',
124            self::StatusPreconditionFailed => 'Precondition Failed',
125            self::StatusRequestEntityTooLarge => 'Request Entity Too Large',
126            self::StatusRequestURITooLong => 'Request URI Too Long',
127            self::StatusUnsupportedMediaType => 'Unsupported Media Type',
128            self::StatusRequestedRangeNotSatisfiable => 'Requested Range Not Satisfiable',
129            self::StatusExpectationFailed => 'Expectation Failed',
130            self::StatusTeapot => "I'm a teapot",
131            self::StatusMisdirectedRequest => 'Misdirected Request',
132            self::StatusUnprocessableEntity => 'Unprocessable Entity',
133            self::StatusLocked => 'Locked',
134            self::StatusFailedDependency => 'Failed Dependency',
135            self::StatusTooEarly => 'Too Early',
136            self::StatusUpgradeRequired => 'Upgrade Required',
137            self::StatusPreconditionRequired => 'Precondition Required',
138            self::StatusTooManyRequests => 'Too Many Requests',
139            self::StatusRequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge => 'Request Header Fields Too Large',
140            self::StatusUnavailableForLegalReasons => 'Unavailable For Legal Reasons',
141
142            self::StatusInternalServerError => 'Internal Server Error',
143            self::StatusNotImplemented => 'Not Implemented',
144            self::StatusBadGateway => 'Bad Gateway',
145            self::StatusServiceUnavailable => 'Service Unavailable',
146            self::StatusGatewayTimeout => 'Gateway Timeout',
147            self::StatusHTTPVersionNotSupported => 'HTTP Version Not Supported',
148            self::StatusVariantAlsoNegotiates => 'Variant Also Negotiates',
149            self::StatusInsufficientStorage => 'Insufficient Storage',
150            self::StatusLoopDetected => 'Loop Detected',
151            self::StatusNotExtended => 'Not Extended',
152            self::StatusNetworkAuthenticationRequired => 'Network Authentication Required',
153
154            default => ''
155        };
156    }
157}
158
159// --- дҪҝз”ЁзӨәдҫӢ ---
160// echo HttpStatus::statusText(200); // иҫ“еҮә: OK
161// echo HttpStatus::statusText(404); // иҫ“еҮә: Not Found
162// echo HttpStatus::statusText(999); // иҫ“еҮә: (з©әеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ)

рҹ”Қ иҜҙжҳҺ

  1. PHP зүҲжң¬иҰҒжұӮпјҡ

item.title: PHPиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№-1
item.description:
д»ҘдёӢжҳҜ PHP 7.0 еҲ° PHP 8.4 жҜҸдёӘдё»иҰҒзүҲжң¬жүҖжңүе…ій”®еҸҳжӣҙзҡ„е®Ңж•ҙжё…еҚ•пјҢжҜҸйЎ№еқҮд»Ҙ жё…жҷ°гҖҒзӢ¬з«ӢгҖҒеҸҜиҝҗиЎҢпјҲжҲ–иҜҙжҳҺжҖ§пјүзҡ„д»Јз Ғеқ—еҪўејҸе‘ҲзҺ°пјҢдҫҝдәҺдҪ йҖҗжқЎеӨҚеҲ¶гҖҒжөӢиҜ•е’ҢеӨҚд№ гҖӮ

рҹ“ҳ PHP 7.0 вҖ“ 8.4 еҗ„зүҲжң¬ж–°еўһеҠҹиғҪдёҺйҮҚиҰҒеҸҳжӣҙпјҲеёҰе®Ңж•ҙд»Јз ҒзӨәдҫӢпјү

рҹ”№ PHP 7.0

 1// 1. ж ҮйҮҸзұ»еһӢеЈ°жҳҺпјҲйңҖ strict_typesпјү
 2declare(strict_types=1);
 3function add(int $a, int $b): int {
 4    return $a + $b;
 5}
 6echo add(2, 3); // 5
 7
 8// 2. иҝ”еӣһзұ»еһӢеЈ°жҳҺ
 9function getName(): string {
10    return "Alice";
11}
12
13// 3. Null еҗҲе№¶иҝҗз®—з¬Ұ
14$username = $_GET['user'] ?? 'guest';
15
16// 4. еӨӘз©әиҲ№иҝҗз®—з¬Ұ
17echo 1 <=> 2; // -1
18echo 2 <=> 2; // 0
19echo 3 <=> 2; // 1
20
21// 5. еҢҝеҗҚзұ»
22$logger = new class {
23    public function log(string $msg) {
24        echo "[LOG] $msg\n";
25    }
26};
27$logger->log("Hello");
28
29// 6. Group use
30use Some\Namespace\{ClassA, ClassB as B};
31
32// 7. з§»йҷӨ mysql_*пјҲд»ҘдёӢд»Јз ҒеңЁ PHP 7+ жҠҘй”ҷпјү
33// $conn = mysql_connect(); // вқҢ Fatal error
34
35// 8. е®үе…ЁйҡҸжңәж•°
36$bytes = random_bytes(16);
37$int = random_int(1, 100);
38
39// 9. Closure::call()
40$obj = (object)['x' => 42];
41(function() { echo $this->x; })->call($obj); // 42

рҹ”№ PHP 7.1

 1// 1. еҸҜдёәз©әзұ»еһӢ
 2function say(?string $name): void {
 3    echo $name ?? 'Anonymous';
 4}
 5say(null); // Anonymous
 6
 7// 2. void иҝ”еӣһзұ»еһӢ
 8function dump(mixed $x): void {
 9    var_dump($x);
10}
11
12// 3. зұ»еёёйҮҸеҸҜи§ҒжҖ§
13class Config {
14    private const SECRET = 'xxx';
15    public const PUBLIC_KEY = 'pub';
16}
17
18// 4. еӨҡејӮеёёжҚ•иҺ·
19try {
20    throw new InvalidArgumentException("Bad input");
21} catch (InvalidArgumentException | OutOfRangeException $e) {
22    echo "Caught: " . $e->getMessage();
23}
24
25// 5. еҜ№з§°ж•°з»„и§Јжһ„
26[$a, $b] = [10, 20];
27['name' => $n, 'age' => $a] = ['name' => 'Bob', 'age' => 30];
28
29// 6. иҙҹеӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҒҸз§»
30echo "hello"[-1]; // 'o'
31
32// 7. iterable дјӘзұ»еһӢ
33function process(iterable $items): void {
34    foreach ($items as $item) {}
35}
36process([1, 2]);
37process(new ArrayIterator([3, 4]));
38
39// 8. ејғз”Ё create_function()
40// $f = create_function('$a,$b', 'return $a+$b;'); // вқҢ Deprecated in 7.2, removed in 7.2+
41$f = fn($a, $b) => $a + $b; // вң…

рҹ”№ PHP 7.2

 1// 1. object зұ»еһӢжҸҗзӨә
 2function cloneIt(object $obj): object {
 3    return clone $obj;
 4}
 5
 6// 2. is_countable()
 7$data = [1, 2, 3];
 8if (is_countable($data)) {
 9    echo count($data); // 3
10}
11
12// 3. еҶ…зҪ® SodiumпјҲзҺ°д»ЈеҠ еҜҶпјү
13$key = random_bytes(SODIUM_CRYPTO_SECRETBOX_KEYBYTES);
14$nonce = random_bytes(SODIUM_CRYPTO_SECRETBOX_NONCEBYTES);
15$ciphertext = sodium_crypto_secretbox('secret', $nonce, $key);
16
17// 4. stream_isatty()
18if (stream_isatty(STDOUT)) {
19    echo "Running in terminal\n";
20}
21
22// 5. spl_object_id()пјҲжҜ” hash жӣҙеҝ«пјү
23$obj = new stdClass();
24$id = spl_object_id($obj); // int
25
26// 6. unserialize й»ҳи®ӨзҰҒз”ЁеҜ№иұЎеҸҚеәҸеҲ—еҢ–
27$data = serialize(new stdClass());
28// unserialize($data); // вқҢ Notice: unserialize(): Class __PHP_Incomplete_Class not allowed
29$obj = unserialize($data, ['allowed_classes' => ['stdClass']]); // вң…
30
31// 7. з§»йҷӨ __autoload()
32// function __autoload($class) {} // вқҢ Fatal error
33spl_autoload_register(function($class) { /* ... */ }); // вң…

рҹ”№ PHP 7.3

 1// 1. зҒөжҙ» Heredoc
 2$html = <<<HTML
 3    <div>
 4        Hello World
 5    </div>
 6    HTML;
 7
 8// 2. JSON ејӮеёё
 9try {
10    json_decode('{invalid json}', flags: JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
11} catch (JsonException $e) {
12    echo "JSON Error: " . $e->getMessage();
13}
14
15// 3. ж–°еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҮҪж•°
16var_dump(str_contains('hello world', 'world'));      // true
17var_dump(str_starts_with('https://', 'http'));       // true
18var_dump(str_ends_with('file.txt', '.txt'));         // true
19
20// 4. еҮҪж•°и°ғз”Ёжң«е°ҫйҖ—еҸ·
21$values = array_merge(
22    [1, 2],
23    [3, 4],   // е…Ғи®ёйҖ—еҸ·
24);
25
26// 5. array_key_first / array_key_last
27$arr = ['a' => 1, 'b' => 2];
28echo array_key_first($arr); // a
29echo array_key_last($arr);  // b
30
31// 6. hrtime() й«ҳзІҫеәҰж—¶й—ҙ
32$start = hrtime(true);
33usleep(1000);
34$end = hrtime(true);
35echo "Elapsed: " . ($end - $start) / 1e6 . " Ојs\n";
36
37// 7. ејғз”ЁиҠұжӢ¬еҸ·и®ҝй—®
38// echo $str{0}; // вқҢ Deprecated
39echo $str[0]; // вң…

рҹ”№ PHP 7.4

 1// 1. еұһжҖ§зұ»еһӢеЈ°жҳҺ
 2class User {
 3    public int $id;
 4    public ?string $name = null;
 5}
 6$user = new User();
 7$user->id = 100;
 8
 9// 2. з®ӯеӨҙеҮҪж•°
10$factor = 10;
11$nums = array_map(fn($n) => $n * $factor, [1, 2, 3]); // [10,20,30]
12
13// 3. з©әеҗҲе№¶иөӢеҖј
14$config = [];
15$config['debug'] ??= true;
16
17// 4. еҚҸеҸҳиҝ”еӣһ & йҖҶеҸҳеҸӮж•°
18interface Factory {
19    function make(): object;
20}
21class UserFactory implements Factory {
22    function make(): User { return new User(); } // иҝ”еӣһжӣҙе…·дҪ“зұ»еһӢ вң…
23}
24
25// 5. FFIпјҲйңҖеҗҜз”Ё ext-ffiпјү
26/*
27$libc = FFI::cdef("int printf(const char *fmt, ...);", "libc.so.6");
28$libc->printf("Hello from C!\n");
29*/
30
31// 6. ејғз”ЁиҠұжӢ¬еҸ·и®ҝй—®пјҲеҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨпјү
32// echo $arr{0}; // вқҢ Fatal error in 7.4+

вҡ пёҸ жіЁж„Ҹпјҡжһ„йҖ еҷЁеұһжҖ§жҸҗеҚҮжҳҜ PHP 8.0 зү№жҖ§пјҢ7.4 дёҚж”ҜжҢҒгҖӮ

item.title: еҚҺеҫ®дё–зәӘзӣёе…іи„ҡжң¬и§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲ
item.description:
SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·

жҸҗзӨә

дҝ®еӨҚUTF-8дёӯж–Үеӯ—з¬Ұиў«й”ҷиҜҜи§ЈйҮҠдёәLatin-1еҜјиҮҙзҡ„д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳпјҢеҸӘжӣҝжҚўеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙд№ұз Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ

  1<?php
  2/**
  3 * Desc:
  4 * Created by PhpStorm
  5 * Project: luoxi
  6 * File: sql_fixer.php
  7 * User: lijianlin
  8 * Date: 2025/10/16 дёҠеҚҲ11:10:42
  9 */
 10
 11
 12/**
 13 * SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·
 14 * дҝ®еӨҚUTF-8дёӯж–Үеӯ—з¬Ұиў«й”ҷиҜҜи§ЈйҮҠдёәLatin-1еҜјиҮҙзҡ„д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳ
 15 */
 16
 17/**
 18 * SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·
 19 * дҝ®еӨҚUTF-8дёӯж–Үеӯ—з¬Ұиў«й”ҷиҜҜи§ЈйҮҠдёәLatin-1еҜјиҮҙзҡ„д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳ
 20 * ж”№иҝӣзүҲпјҡеҸӘжӣҝжҚўеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙд№ұз Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
 21 */
 22
 23/**
 24 * SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·
 25 * дҝ®еӨҚUTF-8дёӯж–Үеӯ—з¬Ұиў«й”ҷиҜҜи§ЈйҮҠдёәLatin-1еҜјиҮҙзҡ„д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳ
 26 * ж”№иҝӣзүҲпјҡеҸӘжӣҝжҚўеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙд№ұз Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
 27 */
 28class SqlEncodingFixer
 29{
 30	private $encodingFixes = [
 31		'ВөВјВіГ¶' => 'еҜјеҮә',
 32		'ГҢГӯВјГ“' => 'ж·»еҠ ',
 33		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·ВҙВҰГҖГӯ' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒеӨ„зҗҶ',
 34		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·В·ВўГҶГ°' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒеҸ‘иө·',
 35		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒ',
 36		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·ГүГЁВјГҶ' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒи®ҫи®Ў',
 37		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·В№ГңГҖГӯВ№ВӨВҫГҹ' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒз®ЎзҗҶе·Ҙе…·',
 38		'ГҒГ·ВіГҢГүГЁВјГҶ' => 'жөҒзЁӢи®ҫи®Ў',
 39		'ГҒГ·ВіГҢГүГЁГ–Гғ' => 'жөҒзЁӢи®ҫзҪ®',
 40		'ГҒГ·ВіГҢВ·ВўГҶГ°' => 'жөҒзЁӢеҸ‘иө·', // ж–°еўһ
 41		'В№В«ГҺГ„ГҶГ°ВІГқ' => 'е…¬ж–Үиө·иҚү',
 42		'Г“ГғВ»В§ГҮВ©ГғГ»ГҺВ¬В»ВӨ' => 'з”ЁжҲ·зӯҫеҗҚз»ҙжҠӨ',
 43		'ГүГҸВҙВ«Г“ГғВ»В§ГҮВ©ГғГ»ГҚВјГҶВ¬' => 'дёҠдј з”ЁжҲ·зӯҫеҗҚеӣҫзүҮ', // ж–°еўһ
 44		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·ГҖГ ГҗГҚ' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒзұ»еһӢ',
 45		'В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·Г“ГғВ»В§ГҲВЁГҸГһ' => 'е·ҘдҪңжөҒз”ЁжҲ·жқғйҷҗ',
 46		'Г“ГғВ»В§В№ВӨГ—Г·ГҒГ·ГҲВЁГҸГһ' => 'з”ЁжҲ·е·ҘдҪңжөҒжқғйҷҗ', // ж–°еўһ
 47		'ГҒГ·ВіГҢГҲВЁГҸГһГүГЁГ–Гғ' => 'жөҒзЁӢжқғйҷҗи®ҫзҪ®',
 48		'ВҙГҪВҙВҰГҖГӯ' => 'еҫ…еӨ„зҗҶ',

249		'ГҲГӢГ”ВұВ№ВӨГ—Г·ВёГҡГҺВ»ГҺВ¬В»ВӨ' => 'дәәе‘ҳе·ҘдҪңеІ—дҪҚз»ҙжҠӨ',
250		'В¶ВЁГ’ГҘВ№ВӨГ—Г·ГҲГ•ГҺГһГҢГөВјГҫ' => 'е®ҡд№үе·ҘдҪңж—Ҙж— жқЎд»¶',
251		'ВҪВ«Г–ВёВ¶ВЁГ“ГғВ»В§Г’Г‘Г“ГҗГҲВЁГҸГһВәГҚГ…ГӨГ–ГғВёВҙГ–ГҶВөВҪГҶГӨГӢГ»Г“ГғВ»В§' => 'е°ҶжҢҮе®ҡз”ЁжҲ·е·Іжңүжқғйҷҗе’Ңй…ҚзҪ®еӨҚеҲ¶еҲ°е…¶д»–з”ЁжҲ·',
252		'Г—Г”В¶ВҜГӢВўГҗГӮГ–ВҙГҗГҗВәГіГҢВЁГҲГҺГҺГұВЈВ¬Г’Г”Г”ГӢГҗГҗMRPВјГҶВ»В®ВөГҲ' => 'иҮӘеҠЁеҲ·ж–°жү§иЎҢеҗҺеҸ°д»»еҠЎпјҢд»ҘиҝҗиЎҢMRPи®ЎеҲ’зӯү',
253		'Г—Г”В¶ВЁГ’ГҘГүГЁВјГҶWORDВәГҚExcelГ„ВЈВ°ГҘ' => 'иҮӘе®ҡд№үи®ҫи®ЎWORDе’ҢExcelжЁЎжқҝ',
254		'ВөВјВіГ¶' => 'еҜјеҮә',
255		'ГҗГһВёГ„ГҲВЁГҸГһ' => 'дҝ®ж”№жқғйҷҗ',
256		'ГғГңГӮГ«ГҗГһВёГ„' => 'еҜҶз Ғдҝ®ж”№',
257		'ВҙВҰГҖГӯВ¶ВҘВјВ¶ВІГӢВөВҘГҠГҪВҫГқ' => 'еӨ„зҗҶйЎ¶зә§иҸңеҚ•ж•°жҚ®',
258		'Г’ВіГғГҰВ¶ВЁГ’ГҘГүГәВіГү' => 'йЎөйқўе®ҡд№үз”ҹжҲҗ',
259		'Г’ВіГғГҰВ№ВҰГ„ГңВ¶ВЁГ’ГҘГүГәВіГү' => 'йЎөйқўеҠҹиғҪе®ҡд№үз”ҹжҲҗ',
260		'ГүГәВіГүГ„ВЈВҝГ©В¶ВЁГ’ГҘГүГәВіГү' => 'з”ҹжҲҗжЁЎеқ—е®ҡд№үз”ҹжҲҗ',
261		'ВҝГҚВ»В§В№ГңГҖГӯ' => 'е®ўжҲ·з®ЎзҗҶ',
262		'ГҸГ®Г„ВҝВ№ГңГҖГӯ' => 'йЎ№зӣ®з®ЎзҗҶ',
263		'ГҺВўГҗГ…В№ГңГҖГӯ' => 'еҫ®дҝЎз®ЎзҗҶ',
264		'ВҪГңВ»ВӘГҢГҳ' => 'жҚ·еҚҺзү№',
265		'ГҠГҪВҫГқВҪГЎВ№В№' => 'ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„',
266		'ГҸВөГҚВіВҪГ“ВҝГҡВ№ГңГҖГӯ' => 'зі»з»ҹжҺҘеҸЈз®ЎзҗҶ',
267	];
268
269	public function __construct()
270	{
271		// жҢүеӯ—з¬ҰдёІй•ҝеәҰйҷҚеәҸжҺ’еәҸпјҢзЎ®дҝқе…ҲеҢ№й…Қй•ҝзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
272		uasort($this->encodingFixes, function ($a, $b) {
273			return strlen($b) - strlen($a);
274		});
275	}
276
277	/**
278	 * жЈҖжөӢж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғ
279	 */
280	private function detectEncoding($filePath)
281	{
282		$content = file_get_contents($filePath);
283
284		// е°қиҜ•жЈҖжөӢзј–з Ғ
285		$encodings = ['UTF-8', 'ISO-8859-1', 'GBK', 'GB2312', 'BIG5'];
286
287		foreach ($encodings as $encoding) {
288			if (mb_check_encoding($content, $encoding)) {
289				return $encoding;
290			}
291		}
292
293		return 'UTF-8'; // й»ҳи®Өиҝ”еӣһUTF-8
294	}
295
296	/**
297	 * дҝ®еӨҚеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„д№ұз ҒеҶ…е®№
298	 */
299	private function fixQuotedContent($content)
300	{
301		// дҪҝз”ЁжӯЈеҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸеҢ№й…ҚеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„еҶ…е®№
302		$pattern = "/'([^']*)'/";
303
304		return preg_replace_callback($pattern, function ($matches) {
305			$quotedContent = $matches[1];
306			$fixedContent = $quotedContent;
307
308			// еҸӘеңЁеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…иҝӣиЎҢжӣҝжҚў
309			foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) {
310				// зЎ®дҝқе®Ңе…ЁеҢ№й…Қж•ҙдёӘд№ұз Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
311				if ($fixedContent === $wrong) {
312					$fixedContent = $correct;
313					break; // дёҖж—ҰеҢ№й…Қе°ұеҒңжӯўпјҢйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚеӨҚжӣҝжҚў
314				}
315			}
316
317			// еҰӮжһңеҶ…е®№жңүеҸҳеҢ–пјҢиҝ”еӣһдҝ®еӨҚеҗҺзҡ„еҶ…е®№
318			if ($fixedContent !== $quotedContent) {
319				return "'" . $fixedContent . "'";
320			}
321
322			// еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүеҸҳеҢ–пјҢиҝ”еӣһеҺҹеҶ…е®№
323			return $matches[0];
324		}, $content);
325	}
326
327	/**
328	 * дҝ®еӨҚеҚ•дёӘSQLж–Үд»¶
329	 */
330	public function fixSqlFile($filePath)
331	{
332		echo "еӨ„зҗҶж–Үд»¶: $filePath\n";
333
334		// еӨҮд»ҪеҺҹж–Үд»¶
335		$backupPath = $filePath . '.backup';
336		if (!copy($filePath, $backupPath)) {
337			echo "  й”ҷиҜҜ: ж— жі•еҲӣе»әеӨҮд»Ҫж–Үд»¶\n";
338			return false;
339		}
340
341		// жЈҖжөӢж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғ
342		$encoding = $this->detectEncoding($filePath);
343		echo "  жЈҖжөӢзј–з Ғ: $encoding\n";
344
345		// иҜ»еҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҶ…е®№
346		$content = file_get_contents($filePath);
347
348		// еҰӮжһңжЈҖжөӢеҲ°зҡ„зј–з ҒдёҚжҳҜUTF-8пјҢе°қиҜ•иҪ¬жҚў
349		if ($encoding !== 'UTF-8') {
350			$content = mb_convert_encoding($content, 'UTF-8', $encoding);
351		}
352
353		// дҝ®еӨҚеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„д№ұз Ғ
354		$originalContent = $content;
355		$content = $this->fixQuotedContent($content);
356
357		// жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰжңүеҸҳеҢ–
358		if ($content !== $originalContent) {
359			// з»ҹи®Ўдҝ®еӨҚзҡ„ж•°йҮҸ
360			$fixCount = 0;
361			foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) {
362				// з»ҹи®ЎеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„жӣҝжҚўж¬Ўж•°
363				$pattern = "/'$wrong'/";
364				preg_match_all($pattern, $originalContent, $matches);
365				$fixCount += count($matches[0]);
366			}
367
368			// дҝқеӯҳдҝ®еӨҚеҗҺзҡ„ж–Үд»¶
369			if (file_put_contents($filePath, $content) !== false) {
370				echo "  жҲҗеҠҹдҝ®еӨҚ {$fixCount} еӨ„д№ұз ҒпјҢеҺҹж–Үд»¶е·ІеӨҮд»Ҫдёә: $backupPath\n";
371				return true;
372			} else {
373				echo "  й”ҷиҜҜ: ж— жі•дҝқеӯҳдҝ®еӨҚеҗҺзҡ„ж–Үд»¶\n";
374				// жҒўеӨҚеӨҮд»Ҫ
375				copy($backupPath, $filePath);
376				return false;
377			}
378		} else {
379			echo "  ж— йңҖдҝ®еӨҚ\n";
380			// еҲ йҷӨеӨҮд»Ҫж–Үд»¶пјҲеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүдҝ®ж”№пјү
381			unlink($backupPath);
382			return true;
383		}
384	}
385
386	/**
387	 * жү№йҮҸдҝ®еӨҚзӣ®еҪ•дёӯзҡ„жүҖжңүSQLж–Үд»¶
388	 */
389	public function batchFix($directory = '.')
390	{
391		echo "ејҖе§Ӣжү№йҮҸдҝ®еӨҚSQLж–Үд»¶...\n\n";
392
393		$sqlFiles = [];
394
395		// йҖ’еҪ’жҹҘжүҫжүҖжңүSQLж–Үд»¶
396		$iterator = new RecursiveIteratorIterator(
397			new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($directory, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS),
398			RecursiveIteratorIterator::SELF_FIRST
399		);
400
401		foreach ($iterator as $file) {
402			if ($file->isFile() && $file->getExtension() === 'sql') {
403				$sqlFiles[] = $file->getPathname();
404			}
405		}
406
407		if (empty($sqlFiles)) {
408			echo "жңӘжүҫеҲ°SQLж–Үд»¶\n";
409			return;
410		}
411
412		echo "жүҫеҲ° " . count($sqlFiles) . " дёӘSQLж–Үд»¶\n\n";
413
414		$successCount = 0;
415		$failCount = 0;
416
417		foreach ($sqlFiles as $sqlFile) {
418			if ($this->fixSqlFile($sqlFile)) {
419				$successCount++;
420			} else {
421				$failCount++;
422			}
423			echo str_repeat("-", 60) . "\n";
424		}
425
426		echo "\nдҝ®еӨҚе®ҢжҲҗ!\n";
427		echo "жҲҗеҠҹ: $successCount дёӘж–Үд»¶\n";
428		echo "еӨұиҙҘ: $failCount дёӘж–Үд»¶\n";
429	}
430
431	/**
432	 * жЈҖжҹҘж–Үд»¶дёӯзҡ„д№ұз ҒпјҲдёҚе®һйҷ…дҝ®ж”№пјү
433	 */
434	public function checkFiles($directory = '.')
435	{
436		echo "жЈҖжҹҘж–Үд»¶дёӯзҡ„д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳ...\n\n";
437
438		$sqlFiles = [];
439
440		// йҖ’еҪ’жҹҘжүҫжүҖжңүSQLж–Үд»¶
441		$iterator = new RecursiveIteratorIterator(
442			new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($directory, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS),
443			RecursiveIteratorIterator::SELF_FIRST
444		);
445
446		foreach ($iterator as $file) {
447			if ($file->isFile() && $file->getExtension() === 'sql') {
448				$sqlFiles[] = $file->getPathname();
449			}
450		}
451
452		if (empty($sqlFiles)) {
453			echo "жңӘжүҫеҲ°SQLж–Үд»¶\n";
454			return;
455		}
456
457		$hasIssues = false;
458
459		foreach ($sqlFiles as $sqlFile) {
460			echo "жЈҖжҹҘж–Үд»¶: $sqlFile\n";
461
462			$content = file_get_contents($sqlFile);
463			$foundIssues = false;
464
465			// жЈҖжҹҘеҚ•еј•еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„д№ұз Ғ
466			$pattern = "/'([^']*)'/";
467			preg_match_all($pattern, $content, $matches);
468
469			foreach ($matches[1] as $quotedContent) {
470				foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) {
471					if ($quotedContent === $wrong) {
472						echo "  еҸ‘зҺ°д№ұз Ғ: '$wrong' -> еә”дёә: '$correct'\n";
473						$foundIssues = true;
474						$hasIssues = true;
475					}
476				}
477			}
478
479			if (!$foundIssues) {
480				echo "  жңӘеҸ‘зҺ°д№ұз Ғ\n";
481			}
482
483			echo str_repeat("-", 60) . "\n";
484		}
485
486		if (!$hasIssues) {
487			echo "\nжүҖжңүж–Үд»¶еқҮжңӘеҸ‘зҺ°д№ұз Ғй—®йўҳ!\n";
488		}
489	}
490}
491
492// е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢз•Ңйқў
493if (php_sapi_name() === 'cli') {
494	$fixer = new SqlEncodingFixer();
495
496	$options = getopt("d:ch", ["directory:", "check", "help"]);
497
498	if (isset($options['h']) || isset($options['help'])) {
499		echo "SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·\n";
500		echo "з”Ёжі•:\n";
501		echo "  php " . basename(__FILE__) . " [йҖүйЎ№]\n\n";
502		echo "йҖүйЎ№:\n";
503		echo "  -d, --directory <зӣ®еҪ•>  жҢҮе®ҡиҰҒеӨ„зҗҶзҡ„зӣ®еҪ•пјҲй»ҳи®ӨеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•пјү\n";
504		echo "  -c, --check            еҸӘжЈҖжҹҘдёҚдҝ®ж”№\n";
505		echo "  -h, --help             жҳҫзӨәжӯӨеё®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ\n\n";
506		echo "зӨәдҫӢ:\n";
507		echo "  php " . basename(__FILE__) . "                    # дҝ®еӨҚеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•жүҖжңүSQLж–Үд»¶\n";
508		echo "  php " . basename(__FILE__) . " -d /path/to/sql    # дҝ®еӨҚжҢҮе®ҡзӣ®еҪ•\n";
509		echo "  php " . basename(__FILE__) . " --check            # еҸӘжЈҖжҹҘдёҚдҝ®ж”№\n";
510		exit(0);
511	}
512
513	$directory = isset($options['d']) ? $options['d'] : (isset($options['directory']) ? $options['directory'] : '.');
514
515	if (isset($options['c']) || isset($options['check'])) {
516		$fixer->checkFiles($directory);
517	} else {
518		$fixer->batchFix($directory);
519	}
520} else {
521	// Webз•Ңйқў
522	echo "<!DOCTYPE html>
523    <html>
524    <head>
525        <title>SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·</title>
526        <meta charset='utf-8'>
527        <style>
528            body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 20px; }
529            .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; }
530            .form-group { margin: 15px 0; }
531            label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; }
532            input[type='text'], select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; }
533            button { background: #007cba; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
534            button:hover { background: #005a87; }
535            .output { background: #f5f5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 20px; white-space: pre-wrap; font-family: monospace; }
536            .success { color: green; }
537            .error { color: red; }
538        </style>
539    </head>
540    <body>
541        <div class='container'>
542            <h1>SQLж–Үд»¶зј–з Ғдҝ®еӨҚе·Ҙе…·</h1>
543            <form method='post'>
544                <div class='form-group'>
545                    <label for='directory'>зӣ®еҪ•и·Ҝеҫ„:</label>
546                    <input type='text' id='directory' name='directory' value='.'>
547                </div>
548                <div class='form-group'>
549                    <label for='action'>ж“ҚдҪң:</label>
550                    <select id='action' name='action'>
551                        <option value='fix'>дҝ®еӨҚж–Үд»¶</option>
552                        <option value='check'>еҸӘжЈҖжҹҘдёҚдҝ®ж”№</option>
553                    </select>
554                </div>
555                <button type='submit'>жү§иЎҢ</button>
556            </form>";
557
558	if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
559		$directory = $_POST['directory'] ?? '.';
560		$action = $_POST['action'] ?? 'fix';
561
562		$fixer = new SqlEncodingFixer();
563
564		ob_start();
565
566		if ($action === 'check') {
567			$fixer->checkFiles($directory);
568		} else {
569			$fixer->batchFix($directory);
570		}
571
572		$output = ob_get_clean();
573
574		echo "<div class='output'>" . htmlspecialchars($output) . "</div>";
575	}
576
577	echo "</div></body></html>";
578}

item.title: йҳ…иҜ»иҝҮзҡ„д№ҰзұҚдёҺзңӢиҝҮзҡ„и§Ҷйў‘
item.description:
еӯҰд№ иө„жәҗжё…еҚ•

Linux иҝҗз»ҙ

  • гҖҠи·ҹиҖҒз”·еӯ©еӯҰLinuxиҝҗз»ҙпјҡShellзј–зЁӢе®һжҲҳгҖӢ
  • гҖҠи·ҹиҖҒз”·еӯ©еӯҰLinuxиҝҗз»ҙ WebйӣҶзҫӨе®һжҲҳгҖӢ
  • гҖҠйёҹе“Ҙзҡ„Linuxз§ҒжҲҝиҸң-еҹәзЎҖеӯҰд№ зҜҮ(з¬¬еӣӣзүҲ)гҖӢ

Web жңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҺдёӯй—ҙд»¶

  • гҖҠNginxй«ҳжҖ§иғҪWebжңҚеҠЎеҷЁиҜҰи§ЈгҖӢ
  • гҖҠRabbitMQе®һжҲҳжҢҮеҚ—гҖӢ

ж•°жҚ®еә“

  • гҖҠmysqlжҳҜжҖҺж ·иҝҗиЎҢзҡ„гҖӢ
  • гҖҠжҲ‘д»¬йғҪжҳҜе°Ҹйқ’иӣҷMySQLзі»еҲ—ж–Үз« гҖӢ
  • гҖҠElasticsearchгҖӢ

зј“еӯҳжҠҖжңҜ

  • гҖҠд»Һйӣ¶ејҖе§ӢеӯҰRedis (й«ҳжҙӘж¶ӣпјҢеҲҳжІійЈһ зј–и‘—)гҖӢ
  • гҖҠRedisејҖеҸ‘дёҺиҝҗз»ҙгҖӢ(д»ҳзЈҠ)
  • гҖҠRedisе…Ҙй—ЁжҢҮеҚ—гҖӢ(JB51.NET)

зј–зЁӢиҜӯиЁҖ

PHP

  • гҖҠи·ҹе…„ејҹиҝһеӯҰPHPгҖӢ

Go

  • гҖҠж·ұе…Ҙжө…еҮәGoиҜӯиЁҖж ёеҝғзј–зЁӢ (еј жңқжҳҺ) гҖӢ
  • гҖҠGoиҜӯиЁҖдёӯж–Үж–ҮжЎЈгҖӢ
  • гҖҠGOиҜӯиЁҖзј–зЁӢд»Һе…Ҙй—ЁеҲ°е®һи·ө_й»„ж°ёж ·гҖӢ
  • гҖҠGoиҜӯиЁҖд»Һе…Ҙй—ЁеҲ°иҝӣйҳ¶е®һжҲҳпјҲи§Ҷйў‘ж•ҷеӯҰзүҲпјүгҖӢ_еҫҗжіў

и„ҡжң¬иҜӯиЁҖ

  • Lua и§Ҷйў‘

зүҲжң¬жҺ§еҲ¶

item.title: Hugoзҡ„жңүе…із®Җжҳ“ж•ҷзЁӢ
item.description:
гҖҗHugoгҖ‘Hugo + Github е…Қиҙ№йғЁзҪІиҮӘе·ұзҡ„еҚҡе®ў

дҪҝз”Ёhugoе·Ҙе…·з”ҹжҲҗйқҷжҖҒйЎөйқўпјҢз„¶еҗҺеңЁgithubдёҠйғЁзҪІйқҷжҖҒйЎөйқўпјҢжқҘе…Қиҙ№жҗӯе»әиҮӘе·ұзҡ„еҚҡе®ў

жҸҗзӨә

иҜҰз»ҶиҜ·жҹҘзңӢй“ҫжҺҘ гҖҗHugo + Github е…Қиҙ№йғЁзҪІиҮӘе·ұзҡ„еҚҡе®ўгҖ‘

жҸҗзӨә

и§Ҷйў‘ең°еқҖ гҖҗHugo + Githubе…Қиҙ№жҗӯе»әеҚҡе®ўпјҢе№¶е®һзҺ°иҮӘеҠЁеҢ–йғЁзҪІгҖ‘

Using Hugo page bundles

Page bundles are an optional way to organize page resources within Hugo.

You can opt-in to using page bundles in Hugo Clarity with usePageBundles in your site configuration or in a page's front matter. Read more about usePageBundles.

With page bundles, resources for a page or section, like images or attached files, live in the same directory as the content itself rather than in your static directory.

Hugo Clarity supports the use of leaf bundles, which are any directories within the content directory that contain an index.md file. Hugo's documentation gives this example:

 1content
 2в”ңв”Җв”Җ about
 3в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.md
 4в”ңв”Җв”Җ posts
 5в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ my-post
 6в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ content1.md
 7в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ content2.md
 8в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ image1.jpg
 9в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ image2.png
10в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ index.md
11в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ my-other-post
12в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ index.md
13в”Ӯ
14в””в”Җв”Җ another-section
15    в”ңв”Җв”Җ ..
16    в””в”Җв”Җ not-a-leaf-bundle
17        в”ңв”Җв”Җ ..
18        в””в”Җв”Җ another-leaf-bundle
19            в””в”Җв”Җ index.md
In the above example `content` directory, there are four leaf bundles:

about: This leaf bundle is at the root level (directly under content directory) and has only the index.md.

my-post: This leaf bundle has the index.md, two other content Markdown files and two image files. image1 is a page resource of my-post and only available in my-post/index.md resources. image2 is a page resource of my-post and only available in my-post/index.md resources.

my-other-post: This leaf bundle has only the index.md.

another-leaf-bundle: This leaf bundle is nested under couple of directories. This bundle also has only the index.md.

The hierarchy depth at which a leaf bundle is created does not matter, as long as it is not inside another leaf bundle.

Advantages to using page bundles

The image below is part of the bundle of this page, and is located at content/post/bundle/building.png. Because it's within this page's bundle, the markup for the image only has to specify the image's filename, building.png.

If you ever change the name of the directory in which this Markdown file and the image reside, the reference to the image would not need to be updated.

In addition to more cleanly organizing your content and related assets, when using page bundles, Hugo Clarity will automatically generate markup for modern image formats, which are smaller in file size.

For instance, when you reference an image like building.png, Hugo Clarity will check to see if the same image (based on filename) exists in WebP, AVIF or JXL formats. If you inspect the image above, you'll see a <source> element for building.webp, because that file is also present. Hugo Clarity will only include the markup if these images exist.

Browsers that support these formats and the <picture> element will load them, while browsers that do not will fall-back to the default image. Read more about this process.

Finally, note that page assets can be further managed and refined within the page's front matter if you wish, and are not limited to images alone.

Disadvantages to using page bundles

Page resources in a bundle are only available to the page with which they are bundled вҖ” that means you can't include an image with one page and then reference it from another.

Images that are being used in multiple places are more appropriate for your Hugo assets directory. Unlike files in the Hugo static directory, files in the assets directory can be run through Hugo Pipes, which includes image processing.

Emoji Support

Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.
